name: Pasta Mexicana
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Avocado, peeled, seeded, and thinly sliced crosswise
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pasta according to package directions. Rinse under cold water and set into a large, shallow serving bowl.
2. Add tomatoes, cucumber, and avocado to the serving bowl.
3. Combine salsa, oil, oregano, chili powder, and cayenne to taste. Mix well, then pour over pasta. Add cilantro and toss gently to distribute vegetables evenly.
